framework.name: MachineMetrics Per-Machine Pricing Model
framework.description: MachineMetrics charges $150-$250/machine/month for basic OEE, $300-$450/machine/month for predictive analytics. 50-machine shop = $90K-$270K/year software + $35K-$115K upfront hardware. Proprietary edge device required per machine.
framework.raw_quote: For a mid-sized shop with 50 CNC machines, you're looking at $7,500 to $22,500 per month â that's $90,000 to $270,000 annually before hardware costs.

source.title: MachineMetrics Pricing in 2026: What Does MachineMetrics Actually Cost?
